page_metadata.biotools__summary: GAIA (G-quAdruplexes In Alive creature) is a user-friendly database with a web interface that can be used to query a data set containing pG4s in diverse species from all three living kingdoms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GAIA (G-quAdruplexes In Alive creature) is a user-friendly database with a web interface that can be used to query a data set containing pG4s in diverse species from all three living kingdoms.
